import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import Sidebar from '../components/Sidebar'; import AppHeader from '../components/AppHeader'; import './HostHomePage.css'; const events = [ { title: "Amara & David's Wedding", date: 'June 10, 2026', rsvp: 82, total: 500, confirmed: '419 / 500 guests confirmed', type: 'Upcoming', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/2d0055/D4A017?text=Wedding' }, { title: 'Lagos Tech Summit', date: 'July 22, 2026', rsvp: 86, total: 1066, confirmed: '892 / 1066 guests confirmed', type: '31 Days', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/1a3a5c/fff?text=Tech+Summit' }, { title: 'Eko Charity Gala', date: 'August 14, 2024', rsvp: 100, total: 300, confirmed: '282 / 300 guests attended', type: 'Archive', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/4a0000/D4A017?text=Charity+Gala' }, { title: 'CEO 50th Birthday', date: 'September 18, 2026', rsvp: null, total: 2451, confirmed: 'Waitlisted Capacity', type: 'Upcoming', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/1a2a1a/fff?text=Birthday' }, { title: 'Heritage Gala Night', date: 'October 12, 2026', rsvp: 70, total: 400, confirmed: '319 / 400 tickets confirmed', type: 'Upcoming', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/3a1a00/D4A017?text=Heritage+Gala' }, { title: 'Tech Innovators Summit', date: 'August 6, 2026', rsvp: 40, total: 800, confirmed: '392 / 800 guests confirmed', type: 'Upcoming', img: 'https://placehold.co/340x200/001a3a/7C3AED?text=Innovators+Summit' }, ]; export default function HostHomePage() { const navigate = useNavigate(); return (

Welcome back, Amara Okeke

Your royal dashboard is ready. You have 3 events coming up this month with a total of 1,240 guests confirmed.

{/* CTA Cards */}
{/* Events Grid */}
Upcoming Events
{events.map((e, i) => (
navigate('/host/invitation')}>
{e.type}
{e.date}

{e.title}

{e.rsvp !== null && ( <>
RSVP Progress {e.rsvp}%
)}

{e.confirmed}

))}
); }
